name: Electronics and batteries category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: Electrical safety, EMC/radio, battery, charger, label, and market conformity evidence are checked.
Model/SKU consistency across test reports, declaration, packaging, and listing is verified.

requirements.requirement: Verify destination-market electrical safety, EMC/radio, battery, charger, energy label, and responsible entity conformity route.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing or mismatched conformity evidence blocks approval for regulated electronics.
requirements.notes: Wireless, lithium battery, charger, child-use, and high-voltage products require extra caution.

requirements.requirement: Model, SKU, ratings, manufacturer, factory, sample, label, and listing data must match across test reports and product materials.
requirements.decision_effect: Material model/SKU mismatch is high severity and requires correction before approval.
requirements.notes: Do not treat a report for a similar model as sufficient without scope evidence.

gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market conformity scheme (CE/FCC/KC/UKCA etc.) per case.
